title: Gameplane module manifest (module.yaml)
description: The bundle metadata layer of a Gameplane module. See docs/module-authoring.md in the Gameplane repo for the authoritative format.

name.description: DNS-1123 label; must match the module directory name.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown on the catalog card.

version.description: Semver; must match the OCI tag the bundle is pushed under.

categories.description: Catalog groupings; a module may belong to several.

summary.description: One-line description for the catalog card.

gameplaneMinVersion.description: Optional minimum operator version; install is refused on older operators.

icon.description: Optional filename of the icon layer (e.g. icon.png).
